title: End Respawn Anchor
description: End Respawn Anchor is a Respawn Anchor's counterpart in the End!
body:
### End Respawn Anchor
Available for Forge 1.18.x ~ 1.20.2 NeoForge 1.20.2~ Fabric 1.20.x~    
If you should have any questions or find bugs, feel free to cantact me.  

### Description
This mod adds End Respawn Anchor.  
End Respawn Anchor makes you possible respawn in the End just like Respawn Anchor does in the Nether.  
Ender perls or Ender eyes can be used as fuels. 
**Note that you will always respawn in the End wherever you die.**

<details><summary> For further information </summary>
Minecraft lets you spawn where respawn position has been set. Therefore, you'll spawn in the End when using exit portal in attempting to teleport to the Overworld. This is quite contrary to our expectatoins where exit portal moves you out of the End. In order to avoid this problem, this mod remembers where your respawn position had been before using End Respawn Anchor and lets you spawn there after entering through exit portal. This feature can be disabled in the configuration.  
</details>

### Craft recipe
**Ingredients:** End Stone x 6 and Ender Eye x 3  
![Imgur](https://i.imgur.com/BQjJ0SJ.png)
